description: Vertical graphic card combining a photo background, a headline, and a quoted news excerpt, in DOL's style. The upper portion is a desaturated blue-tinted photograph of a person (seen from behind and the side) wearing a welding helmet flipped up, working in a shop. Across the lower middle is a headline in white serif type 'Skilled Trades SURGE!' ('Skilled Trades' in italic, 'SURGE!' bold). Below sits a white rounded text box containing the blue 'KARE 11' news logo and article text in black serif: 'A new school year has officially started and with it, new numbers that show a surge in trade schools. New data from Validated Insights, a higher education marketing firm, reveals a significant increase in trade school enrollment.' A faint white DOL seal appears centered at the bottom.
notable_text: Skilled Trades SURGE!; KARE 11; A new school year has officially started... New data from Validated Insights... reveals a significant increase in trade school enrollment.
